data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ - Acceptance criteria verified: (1) Agent PostToolUse hook extracts first SUGGESTION: line and calls suggestion-record.sh via DSO_SUGGESTION_RECORD_CMD pattern (2) warns 'malformed' to stderr on empty sentinel, exits 0 (3) hook registered in plugin.json Agent matcher → dispatchers/post-agent.sh (4) 8 edge case tests including non-agent skip, missing sentinel, first-only extraction
